name: Kevin Rubin
bio: Kevin Rubin was appointed Chief Financial Officer on May 26, 2025, succeeding Remo Canessa. His FY2025 disclosure reflects only the partial-year period from his appointment through fiscal year-end July 31, 2025, which is why his $87,235 salary is well below the $470,000 annualized rate paid to a Zscaler CFO. The vast majority of his FY2025 total is the equity grant made on his start date — RSUs, PSUs at probable performance, and stock options that vest over four years.

footnotes: Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2025 performance condition (grant-date fair value). Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion would be $12,783,650.
Option Awards: a stock option granted on his start date with one-fourth vesting on May 26, 2026 and the remainder monthly through May 26, 2029.
All Other Compensation reflects relocation benefits per the Rubin Offer Letter: a $25,000 relocation cash allowance, $7,013 of temporary housing fees, and an associated $10,417 tax gross-up.
Salary reflects only the partial-year period from his May 26, 2025 appointment through July 31, 2025 fiscal year-end.
